## Depressed Mood

Depressed mood is one of the two core symptoms of Major Depressive Disorder. It refers to persistent sadness, emptiness, or hopelessness present most of the day, nearly every day, for at least two weeks.

## How It Manifests

People often describe feeling down, blue, empty, or numb. It may show up as persistent sadness, tearfulness, hopelessness, or emotional numbness.
